headline: Deutsche Bank Starts International Paper (IP) at Hold, Flags Sector Pressures
summary: International Paper Company (NYSE:IP) is included among the 15 Cheapest Stocks with Highest Dividends. On April 1, Deutsche Bank initiated coverage of International Paper Company (NYSE:IP) with a Hold rating. It also set a $38 price target on the stock. The firm said the packaging sector is “navigating a complex and evolving economic landscape” at […]
